title: Fermented Crumbly Portuguese Cheese Crumble
description: A crowd-pleasing Portuguese dish featuring the flavors of Thailand and Mediterranean cuisine, this fermented crumbly cheese crumble is perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: In a large bowl, crumble the Portuguese cheese into small pieces.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the Thai-basil-horapa marinade, garlic powder, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the marinade mixture to the cheese and mix until well combined.
Stir in the crushed Mediterranean olives, pitted green olives, and chopped parsley.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and bake for 20 minutes.
Remove the dish from the oven and sprinkle with additional crushed olives if desired.
Return the dish to the oven and bake for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the crumble is set.
Remove the dish from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
